title: Learning environment — Practicing with production-like clusters
text:
If you want to practice setting up a more production-like cluster, you can use
kubeadm
. Setting up a cluster with kubeadm is an advanced task that requires multiple machines (physical or virtual) and careful configuration.
For learning about production environments, see
Production environment
.

Follow the
Hello Minikube
tutorial to deploy your first application
Learn about
Kubernetes components
Explore
kubectl commands
